descriptions.text: Sega Game Pack 4 in 1 is a collection of four video games released by Sega in 1992 for their Game Gear handheld console and was generally included with new consoles. The games include Flash Columns, Penalty Shootout, Tennis and Rally.

Sega Game Pack 4 in 1 is a collection of four video games released by Sega in 1992 for their Game Gear handheld console and was generally included with new consoles. The games include Flash Columns, Penalty Shootout, Tennis and Rally.

Sega Game Pack 4 en 1 es una colección de cuatro videojuegos lanzados por Sega en 1992 para la portátil Game Gear y generalmente se incluía con las paquetes de la consola. Los juegos incluidos son: Flash Columns, Penalty Shootout, Tenis y Rally.

Sega Game Pack 4 in 1 è una raccolta di quattro videogiochi distribuita da SEGA nel 1992. La raccolta presenta tre generi, guida, sportivo e rompicapo, e fu tra i titoli venduti in bundle con la console portatile Game Gear.
